---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an addition or improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## Summary

What would you like to see added or changed?

## Motivation

Why would this be useful for the project's research goals?

## Alignment check

Before submitting, please confirm this request does not violate the non-optimisation constraints:

- [ ] This change does not introduce positive reinforcement for calm states
- [ ] This change does not add gamification (scores, streaks, dashboards)
- [ ] This change does not connect classifier output to stimulation amplitude
- [ ] This change does not claim to detect Tier 3 or Tier 4 contemplative states
- [ ] If it adds a new feature, it can be validated against Phase C transfer testing

## Proposed approach

How might this be implemented?

## Alternatives considered

Are there other ways to achieve the same goal?
